existing_regression.note: All 7 existing regression tests pass after F-FORECAST-001 + F-TABLE-001 patches applied. No fixture regression.

eval_runner_dod.note: DoD v0.1 thresholds still met on all 5 demo fixtures.

new_regression_cases_added.must_not_happen: answer mixes multiple forecast horizons (2030 target, 2045 model, 12-month outlook) without labeling type + horizon per number
citation for a claim sourced from a chart/table page uses text-citation format [file, page, section, quote] instead of table/chart format [file, page, table_id/chart_id, ...]

conclusion: Patches do not break existing regression. 2 new regression cases created to lock the fixed failures.
